actionUnits.condition: Building7 has an EventTrigger (eventID 4 = PointerClick) whose persistent call targets MonoBehaviour fileID 300765813 (script GUID a8e394fec5558d54daa16e3fcb3cc7d3), which is the Commercial script. The callback invokes Commercial.showlabel(). Expected result: the Player's child[1] TextMeshPro text updates to the first 20 characters of 'Commercial:Totoro Theater', i.e., 'Commercial:Totoro Th'.

Building7 has EventTrigger (eventID 4 = PointerClick) with a persistent call to Commercial.showlabel() on MonoBehaviour fileID 300765813 (script GUID a8e394fec5558d54daa16e3fcb3cc7d3). Invoking showlabel should set Player.child[1].TextMeshPro.text to the first 20 chars of "Commercial:Totoro Theater" => "Commercial:Totoro Th".
